text.title: AppError, Unit Tests with mockall, Integration Tests
text.summary: Single AppError enum implementing IntoResponse, unit tests with mockall mocks, and Axum integration tests via tower::ServiceExt::oneshot.

section.title: AppError Pattern

rule.statement: Define one AppError enum with thiserror; implement IntoResponse so all routes return a consistent JSON error shape. Never unwrap() outside main.rs and tests.
rule.rationale: Scattered HTTPException/unwrap calls produce inconsistent error shapes and cause 500 panics in production. One AppError with #[from] on DB errors means new sources automatically get correct HTTP codes.

section.reference: AppError enum with thiserror + Axum IntoResponse

example.code: // WRONG - unwrap turns 404 into a 500 panic let user = db.get_user(id).await.unwrap();
// CORRECT - ? propagates to AppError → IntoResponse let user = db.get_user(id).await?.ok_or(AppError::NotFound("User".into()))?;

rule.statement: Use tower::ServiceExt::oneshot to test handlers against a real Router without binding a TCP port.
rule.rationale: oneshot tests the full handler stack (extractors, middleware, response) without network overhead or port conflicts in parallel test runs.
